name: bartholfidel
description: BartholFidel — behavioral anomaly detection and threat prevention platform

scripts.dev: npm run build -w @bartholfidel/shared && concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @bartholfidel/api" "npm run dev -w @bartholfidel/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @bartholfidel/shared && npm run build -w @bartholfidel/api && npm run build -w @bartholfidel/web
